list.name: user
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, display_name AS __text FROM users ORDER BY display_name
list.label: Athlete

list.name: exercise
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT exercise_name AS __value, exercise_name AS __text FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user ORDER BY exercise_name
list.label: Exercise

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 week', time) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Sets" FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user AND set_type = 'normal' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('1 week', time) AS time, COALESCE(NULLIF(muscle_group, ''), 'other') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user AND set_type = 'normal' AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(muscle_group, ''), 'other') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user AND set_type = 'normal' AND time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '4 weeks' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT exercise_name AS "Exercise", COUNT(*) AS "Sets", ROUND(MAX(weight_kg)::numeric, 1) AS "Max Weight (kg)", MAX(reps) AS "Max Reps" FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user AND set_type = 'normal' AND time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '4 weeks' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT time, weight_kg AS "Weight (kg)", reps AS "Reps" FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user AND set_type = 'normal' AND weight_kg IS NOT NULL AND exercise_name LIKE '$exercise' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Estimated 1RM Trend (top exercises)
panels.description: Estimated using Epley formula: 1RM = weight * (1 + reps/30)

targets.rawSql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT time::date AS day, exercise_name, weight_kg * (1 + reps / 30.0) AS est_1rm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY exercise_name, time::date ORDER BY weight_kg * (1 + reps / 30.0) DESC) AS rn FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user AND set_type = 'normal' AND weight_kg > 0 AND reps > 0 AND reps <= 12 AND $__timeFilter(time) AND exercise_name IN ( SELECT exercise_name FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user AND weight_kg > 0 AND time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '4 weeks' GROUP BY exercise_name ORDER BY MAX(weight_kg) DESC LIMIT 6 ) ) SELECT day AS time, exercise_name AS metric, ROUND(est_1rm::numeric, 1) AS value FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY day

SELECT time::date AS "Date", workout_id AS "Workout", COUNT(DISTINCT exercise_name) AS "Exercises", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE set_type = 'normal') AS "Working Sets", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(weight_kg, 0) * COALESCE(reps, 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Total Volume (kg)" FROM strength_sets WHERE user_id = $user AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 20
